steps.t: Numûru believes you should return to camp to assess what actions can best win the battle in Emax Dûl. You can return to Nashûbu quickly using the near…
You have done much to further the war effort in Emax Dûl. You should return to Numûru in Nashûbu for instructions.
You have done much to win the battle at Emax Dûl. You should return to Numûru in Nashûbu.
